content.en:
"Block the news as much as possible!"

The powerhouse of the late stage of the Fourth Realm of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce, the Lord of the Duogu Realm, said.

The other Fourth Realms nodded one after another, and that could only be the case.

Immediately, they began to discuss the ownership of the Duowei Treasure Gourd, and there was no way for any of their forces to monopolize this place, otherwise they would inevitably encounter a joint attack by other forces.

The multi-dimensional treasure is not an ordinary treasure, this is an innate multi-dimensional treasure!

Any innate multi-dimensional treasure is enough to make the fourth realm crazy, or even the fifth realm crazy.

The premise is that the innate multi-dimensional arcana, if it is incomplete, it will lose some of the characteristics of the innate multi-dimensional arcana, and only a little bit of ability remains.

Like the multi-dimensional treasure bottle, if all the multi-dimensional treasure bottles are fused together to form a real multi-dimensional treasure bottle, its value is extremely terrifying, and the effect is unimaginable, and "eight seven zero" has incredible effects and special abilities.

But now there are none.

Suddenly.

The peak powerhouse of the Fourth Realm of the Immortal Ancient Sect, the Silver Armor Realm Master, said: "Everyone, prevent the news from leaking, next, you are not allowed to leave the Five Thousand Territory, there is no problem with this!"

"No problem, after all, when it comes to Duowei Baohu, it should be so cautious!"

The other Fourth Realms nodded their heads.

Immediately, they began to formally discuss the ownership of Duowei Baohu.

But before that, they had to determine if the multi-dimensional treasure of the withered vines and forests was truly conceived.

At this time, the Lord of the Silver Armor Realm said: "Our power cannot penetrate into the sea of withered vines, but we have already sent the super-dimensional realm at the peak of the third realm to probe it, and it is now certain that the multi-dimensional treasure has not yet been fully conceived, and it will take a long time before it is fully conceived, but it is only one step away from being formed." As long as it is formed, it can be regarded as a quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasure. "

As soon as I heard that it was a quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasure, many of the Fourth Realms were a little disappointed.

The Ancient Realm Lord smiled and said, "Everyone, the quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasure is better, if it is really a complete innate multi-dimensional treasure level multi-dimensional treasure level, its vision is too amazing, even if the four thousand territory does not know for the time being, but it will definitely be known in the future." When the time comes, our major forces will not be able to maintain a complete innate multi-dimensional treasure when they join forces. When the time comes, just send a Fifth Realm over there, who can stop it?"

Many Fourth Realms nodded.

That's true, their strength is not good, and they can't keep the complete innate multi-dimensional treasure.

"Everyone, according to our investigation, this time the multi-dimensional treasure has produced a total of six, the value of the multi-dimensional treasure gourd, you should know very well, even if it is a quasi-congenital multi-dimensional treasure treasure, it is much higher than the value of the multi-dimensional treasure bottle, a quasi-congenital multi-dimensional treasure level multi-dimensional treasure gourd, the value is comparable to dozens of multi-dimensional treasure bottles. It is valuable to the fifth realm, but if we join forces, we can use the multi-dimensional treasure gourd to go one step further, and we can still keep these six multi-dimensional treasure gourds. "The Silver Armor Realm is the main way.

"Six Duowei Treasure Buds!"

Many of the Fourth Realms were even more excited.

Immediately, they began to prepare for the attack on the withered vine forest, and restricted the entry of other third realms, otherwise it would be troublesome once the news was exposed.

Then they gave the order to pass.

Suddenly, a large number of Third Realms rushed over from among the major overlord-level extradimensional forces and gathered on the side of the Withered Vine Forest Sea.

In a short period of time, a large number of Third Realms have gathered here, and the liveliness is even higher than that of the Five Thousand Realms.

All of a sudden, many extradimensional realms were discussing this matter.

Ye Tian had been paying attention to the affairs of the major territories, and the news from the withered vine forest sea was naturally known to him for the first time.

"The major overlord-level extradimensional forces have gathered in the sea of withered vines, what is going on over there?"

Ye Tian was very curious.

There is no doubt that there must be an amazing chance over there, otherwise those Fourth Realms would not have gone over in person, and a large number of Third Realms were also dispatched, not to mention pouring out, but the top Third Realm was almost all sent over.

If some accidents happen, it will be enough to cause heavy losses to the major forces, and you can imagine how amazing the opportunities involved are.

this day.

Ye Tian also came over, but he was stopped by the major overlord-level extradimensional forces, and he was not allowed to approach the sea of withered vines.

Except for the third territory of the major overlord-level superdimensional forces, the other third realms are not allowed to get close to the withered vine forest, obviously wanting to join forces to occupy the withered vine forest.

Immediately, Ye Tian inquired about the news, but the information he knew was limited, only that a large number of vines flew out of the sea of withered vines, killing many extra-dimensional creatures, even including the extra-dimensional creatures of the third realm.

But Ye Tian didn't know these vines, and the other third realms didn't know 0........

"Maybe you can ask the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, this guy has a very extraordinary background, maybe I know. "

......

Ye Tian came to find the Tricky Wood Red Dragon again.

"Ye Tian, what are you doing again?"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon asked.

However, he saw that Ye Tian's aura seemed to be even stronger, and he was also shocked in his heart.

"Senior Trick Wood Red Dragon, let me ask you, do you know this thing?"

Ye Tianyi waved his hand, condensed the phantom of the vine, and showed it to the Tricky Wood Red Dragon to see.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon looked at the image of this vine attack, thought about it for a moment, and was immediately shocked.

"Isn't this a Duowei Bao Vine?"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon exclaimed.

"Predecessor of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, what is the Duowei Treasure Vine?" Ye Tian asked.

Wei Mu Chilong said: "The multi-dimensional treasure gourd is not of much value, it is just a multi-dimensional plant, but the multi-dimensional treasure that grows on it is an innate multi-dimensional treasure! Of course, it takes too long for the multi-dimensional treasure to really grow and become a complete multi-dimensional treasure gourd, and it requires too much energy. In my opinion, this should not be a complete multi-dimensional treasure. But even if it is incomplete, its value is above the multi-dimensional treasure bottle. "

On top of the multi-dimensional vase?

Ye Tian took a deep breath, the multi-dimensional treasure bottle was enough for the fourth realm to snatch, and its value could not be described by multi-dimensional dao coins.

The value of Duowei Baohu is still above it, how hard to think of the treasure of 3.2 elephants!

"Senior Trick Wood Red Dragon, what is the role of the Duowei Treasure Gourd?"

Ye Tian continued to ask for advice.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon did not hide it, and introduced: "The function of the multi-dimensional treasure is to assist in the cultivation of the innate multi-dimensional Dao body, and it contains a special multi-dimensional treasure essence, using the multi-dimensional treasure essence to cultivate the innate multi-dimensional Dao body, even if it fails, it will not fall, the side effects will be reduced a lot, and the success rate will be increased." If you have cultivated the innate multi-dimensional Dao body, you can also quickly improve the realm of the innate multi-dimensional Dao body by using the multi-dimensional treasure essence. "

"Of course, to condense the multi-dimensional treasure essence, you need to slowly nourish and nurture with the origin of the extra-dimensional realm in the body, or use some special resources to condense and breed, although the speed is not fast, but once you condense enough multi-dimensional treasure essence, it will be amazing!"
